# Live monitoring routes extraction (2026-03-10 11:32Z)

_**User**_

Create the file `d:\web development\test\server\routes\superadmin\live-monitoring.js` by extracting the Live Agents routes from `d:\web development\test\server\routes\superadmin.js`.

Read lines 1806-2099 from `server/routes/superadmin.js` to get the relevant route handlers.

The new file should:
1. Import express and create a router
2. Import `{ query, queryOne }` from `../../db.js`
3. Import `{ originateIntoStasis, originateToContext, getQueueStasisAppName, isAriConfigured }` from `../../asterisk-ari.js`
4. Import `{ getBridgedCallInfo, forceLogoutAgent }` from `../../ari-stasis-queue.js`
5. Import `{ destroySessionsForUser }` from `../../session-utils.js`
6. Import `{ endAgentSession }` from `../../agent-sessions.js`
7. Import `{ validate, monitorSchema }` from `../../utils/schemas.js`
8. Import `{ getEffectiveTenantId, requireSuperadmin }` from `./middleware.js`
9. Copy route handlers for:
    - GET /live-agents
    - POST /live-agents/:agentId/monitor
    - POST /live-agents/:agentId/force-end-break
    - POST /live-agents/:agentId/force-logout
10. Export router as default

CRITICAL: Copy the route handler code EXACTLY as it appears in the source file. Do NOT skip any routes.
